description: INFID is a member-based civil society organization that has been fighting for Indonesia's development since 1985. The greatest strength of the INFID movement is its network of 80 members throughout Indonesia and its commitment to evidence-based policy advocacy.

newsletter.description: Get the latest updates on programs, research, and news about policy advocacy in Indonesia.

contact.title: INFID Secretariat
contact.address: Jl. Sebret No.4 C, Jati Padang, Pasar Minggu, South Jakarta, 12540, Indonesia
